clean_body: Trump is trying to delegitimize the protests | | | It’s been a truly brutal past few days, team — Protests across the country in response to the Minneapolis Police’s completely unjustifiable killing of George Floyd have led to even more police violence. And instead of acting like a true leader by trying to bridge divisions in our society, Trump is fanning the flames. It’s a convenient narrative for Trump, allowing him to call out Antifa, George Soros, and other boogeymen favored by the right wing. But there are two very big problems with this narrative. First, unsurprisingly, it’s just not true. Second, and more importantly, it’s an attempt to once again silence a community that has been silenced over and over again throughout our country’s history — and an excuse to double down on the brutality and violence they’re protesting against. Rightwing media organizations like Breitbart are falling over themselves to make this a story about “organized groups” (even going so far as to list “Antifa” as one of their trending topics). In a moment like this one, we need real facts — and real leadership. Trump spent the past few days tweeting from a darkened White House and staging a photo op at a church after the police used tear gas to clear the streets of peaceful protestors. Thanks, The Defeat Disinfo Team P.S. Now is the part of the email where we normally ask you to chip in what you can to help us fight back against Trump’s flood of lying ads. name: Vote Dean Browning for Congress!
subject: 🚨 Hurry, get to the polls now! 🚨
body:
The polls are about to close, but there is still some time!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
The polls are about to close, but there is still some time!
My consultants tell me this could come down to just a few votes, and I need to make sure you have voted.
As one of my key supporters, it's critical that you vote today!
Once you have voted, can you please forward this email to all of your friends and family?
For Pennsylvania,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07

name: Michael Bennet
subject: An Open Letter to my Fellow Coloradans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
It’s been one week since the world watched Minneapolis police kill George Floyd. You cannot watch the video without feeling sick, without remembering Ahmaud Arbery, Breonna Taylor, Tamir Rice, Trayvon Martin, Philando Castile, and the countless other Americans who have lost their lives in this country because they were black.
When I worked for the City and County of Denver, one of the first tragedies we confronted was the unjustified shooting of a black teenager named Paul Childs by law enforcement in Park Hill.
What happened to George Floyd would never happen to my daughters. It would never happen to me. That is the reality we face, the reality thousands are protesting in Colorado and across the country, and the reality we must change.
In recent days, many have observed that the current pandemic has exposed profound inequality in our society. We should not have needed a pandemic to see this. If you have been paying any attention, if you have listened to voices in the black community and studied our history, then you know these injustices have been with us for generations and grown worse in recent decades. You can draw a straight line from slavery to Jim Crow to the redlining of our banking and housing systems to mass incarceration to the recent killing of black people from Georgia to Minnesota.
This week, I returned to work in a capitol building whose stones were placed by enslaved human beings. American slavery is not ancient history. Our country enslaved human beings less than a hundred years before I was born in 1964. We will never heal as a country until we fully confront and dismantle the systemic racism that plagues every aspect of our society. As a white male and a United States Senator, it is my duty to use my platform and position to do this.
I commit to working with my colleagues and others to address structural oppression and racism in our country. I commit to calling out leaders, including the President of the United States, who stoke hatred, racial division, and violence.
I commit to hearing and acting on the fair and overdue demands of those protesting and demonstrating in Colorado and across the country. And I commit to being an ally to the black community because Black Lives Matter.
Michael Bennet
Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
Contributions or gifts to Bennet for Colorado are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive only the most urgent updates from our campaign, please click here [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails] . unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/dfd0d788-faa4-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb/f94a80e9-18a5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTRhODBlOS0xOGE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AavPL0lu7X6ZKcnRHI34hIlQZkt7_dpSbv-wrWHU73I=&id=102145602 https://michaelbennet.com/ [https://michaelbennet.com/]

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Share these videos before they are taken down!
body:
| |
---
This is a big week! **We are officially launching the[Second Opinion Project](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU0LWU4N2EyNWNhNTZiMjQwZDA5OWI2ODIxNTRkNjYxNDlh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tLz9taWQ9NDIxMjUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Ec2n-eOyrgIDAQG7DZTcFw)!** The Second Opinion Project is our hub for everything about the untold damage being done by the continued lockdowns and why we need to reopen the country. The biggest component of the project is a series of video interviews with physicians from all over the country, giving their expert opinions about their on-the-ground experiences with patients right now.

The problem we face is that age-old problem where some people (mostly on the left) believe that there are only a few “experts” that get to make all the decisions. Well, we disagree with that all the time, not just during COVID-19.

And so, our team, with your help, has put together the Second Opinion Project because the prescription given to our nation by Dr. Fauci and other academic doctors has had severe, negative side effects, and it is time for a second opinion.

**This week, we are asking you to help get these second opinions in front of as many Americans as we can!** Because it’s not just the guidelines and mandates being issued. It’s also about the fear that the media has instilled in so many of our fellow Americans. The doctors we are interviewing have a different message for the country, and we know that social media companies and the mainstream media would like to censor these opposing views. That’s why it’s up to you and me and push these interviews and other parts of the project out as much as we can!
|
---
**SHARE THE SECOND OPINION PROJECT VIDEOS**
Please make sure to watch and share the interviews with doctors from around the country. We have included links to some of the first videos we have posted, but you can find all of the videos on [www.SecondOpinionProject.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU0LWU4N2EyNWNhNTZiMjQwZDA5OWI2ODIxNTRkNjYxNDlh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2Vjb25kb3BpbmlvbnByb2plY3QuY29tL3NpZ24zOTYxMDUwMD9taWQ9NDIxMjUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRI3ZpZGVvcw&K=667_ybZ7LAi7DwqXmvYqwA).
|

**SECOND OPINION PROJECT LETTER**
1. **If you’re a doctor** , [read this letter to President Trump](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU0LWU4N2EyNWNhNTZiMjQwZDA5OWI2ODIxNTRkNjYxNDlh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXI_bWlkPTQyMTI1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xwBfxjoNp7YLR9pCTHbYxg) about how our country needs a second opinion and how the so-called “experts” are not always right. You will have an opportunity to **sign the letter** after you have finished reading it. Please also share this with other doctors you know.
2. **If you are not a doctor** , but would like to ask doctors you know to sign the letter, **use the invitation we have provided to ask your doctor to sign the letter**. The text of the invitation and the letter, itself, have been [posted online for you to use](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU0LWU4N2EyNWNhNTZiMjQwZDA5OWI2ODIxNTRkNjYxNDlh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvc2Vjb25kb3Bpbmlvbi1sZXR0ZXItcmVxdWVzdD9taWQ9NDIxMjUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=KqoxKixxlHzBiWPiXPbzSQ).

**DONATE TO THE SECOND OPINION PROJECT**
I know that times are tough for so many Americans, but in order to continue funding this project, recording more interviews, and promoting it past the left-wing censors, [we need your help, if you are able to give](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU0LWU4N2EyNWNhNTZiMjQwZDA5OWI2ODIxNTRkNjYxNDlh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2ZvdW5kYXRpb24ub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_bWlkPTQyMTI1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=HAwdXEyrFkCFhTV_FciA_w). Any amount will help!

It’s not just the economy that we are worried about. It’s the lives, the physical and mental health of Americans, and the possibility that our country could be fundamentally transformed by left-wing politicians and their allied groups as they exploit the virus to make systemic changes to our nation that they haven’t been able to implement after decades of trying.

Thank you for all you do, and for sharing the [Second Opinion Project](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTU0LWU4N2EyNWNhNTZiMjQwZDA5OWI2ODIxNTRkNjYxNDlh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMjY%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2ZvdW5kYXRpb24ub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_bWlkPTQyMTI1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=WQ-FZjf61s2ox-BNlQBsqw)!
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

clean_body: | | This is a big week! We are officially launching the! The Second Opinion Project is our hub for everything about the untold damage being done by the continued lockdowns and why we need to reopen the country. The biggest component of the project is a series of video interviews with physicians from all over the country, giving their expert opinions about their on-the-ground experiences with patients right now. The problem we face is that age-old problem where some people (mostly on the left) believe that there are only a few “experts” that get to make all the decisions. Well, we disagree with that all the time, not just during COVID-19. And so, our team, with your help, has put together the Second Opinion Project because the prescription given to our nation by Dr. Fauci and other academic doctors has had severe, negative side effects, and it is time for a second opinion. This week, we are asking you to help get these second opinions in front of as many Americans as we can! Because it’s not just the guidelines and mandates being issued. It’s also about the fear that the media has instilled in so many of our fellow Americans. The doctors we are interviewing have a different message for the country, and we know that social media companies and the mainstream media would like to censor these opposing views. That’s why it’s up to you and me and push these interviews and other parts of the project out as much as we can! | SHARE THE SECOND OPINION PROJECT VIDEOS Please make sure to watch and share the interviews with doctors from around the country. We have included links to some of the first videos we have posted, but you can find all of the videos on . | Second Opinion Promo Video Dr. Mark McDonald: CDC Back to School Rules Are Child Abuse Dr. Simone Gold: There is More Than One Opinion on COVID-19 Dr. Clare Gray: The Predictions Were Wrong Dr. Martha Leatherman: Covid Creates New Risks for Seniors Dr. Jeffrey Kornitzer: Brain Tumor: Waited Two Weeks for MRI | SIGN AND SHARE THE PETITION Once you have signed it, you will have the opportunity to share it on social media. | SECOND OPINION PROJECT LETTER 1. If you’re a doctor , about how our country needs a second opinion and how the so-called “experts” are not always right. You will have an opportunity to sign the letter after you have finished reading it. Please also share this with other doctors you know. 2. If you are not a doctor , but would like to ask doctors you know to sign the letter, use the invitation we have provided to ask your doctor to sign the letter. The text of the invitation and the letter, itself, have been . | DONATE TO THE SECOND OPINION PROJECT I know that times are tough for so many Americans, but in order to continue funding this project, recording more interviews, and promoting it past the left-wing censors, . Any amount will help! It’s not just the economy that we are worried about. It’s the lives, the physical and mental health of Americans, and the possibility that our country could be fundamentally transformed by left-wing politicians and their allied groups as they exploit the virus to make systemic changes to our nation that they haven’t been able to implement after decades of trying. Thank you for all you do, and for sharing the ! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. disclaimer_text: Paid for by People First Future
body:
I'm endorsing Joe Biden today because, just a few hours ago in Philadelphia, he spoke about his plans to reduce police violence.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17726645/204234909/-1445340428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM5MjJjNy0xZmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7ftlxMjU-0_3YUGA3ifnTmlrq4j0KGuzNYpq6qJno0=&emci=94ee803e-19a5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=b5c922c7-1fa5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&ceid=1262380)
Team, I have big news to share:
**Today, I'm endorsing Joe Biden to be the next President of the United States.**
I'll explain why in a second. First, though, I need your help:
**[I'm building a grassroots movement to elect people-first candidates who will lead the fight for priorities like police reform. Can you help me out by chipping in today and becoming a founding donor to People First Future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17726646/204234910/488827290?refcode=em20200602-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM5MjJjNy0xZmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7ftlxMjU-0_3YUGA3ifnTmlrq4j0KGuzNYpq6qJno0=)**
[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17726647/204234911/488827290?refcode=em20200602-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM5MjJjNy0xZmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7ftlxMjU-0_3YUGA3ifnTmlrq4j0KGuzNYpq6qJno0=)
I'm endorsing Joe Biden today because, just a few hours ago in Philadelphia, he spoke about his plans to reduce police violence. They include:
* Passing a federal ban on chokeholds by police
* Stopping the transfer of military gear to local police
* Setting up national use-of-force best practices
* Holding officers accountable for misconduct

These policies are important first steps that we need to take to protect our communities, particularly communities of color.
But it's not enough to propose good policies. **We also need to elect candidates — at every level, from the President of the United States to District Attorneys and Sheriffs — who will make those policies a reality.**
That's why I started People First Future: to find, support, and elect those candidates. **[Will you join me by making a gift and becoming a founding donor today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17726648/204234912/488827290?refcode=em20200602-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM5MjJjNy0xZmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7ftlxMjU-0_3YUGA3ifnTmlrq4j0KGuzNYpq6qJno0=)**
Also, team, keep an eye on your inbox: in the next few days, we'll be rolling out even more endorsements.
Thank you for being a part of the fight for a people-first future,
Julián
[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17726649/204234913/488827290?refcode=em20200602-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWM5MjJjNy0xZmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s7ftlxMjU-0_3YUGA3ifnTmlrq4j0KGuzNYpq6qJno0=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kansans=20for=20LaTurner?=
subject: BREAKING NEWS: LaTurner for Congress releases impressive list of campaign Co-Chairs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
List includes Dr. Helen VanEtten and ten additional notable Kansans | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/518e8d185607/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-6924590?e=1050d051da)
---
| | Friends,

We sent this press announcement to the media this morning, and wanted to make sure you had a chance to see it too. This is BIG news for our campaign and we are delighted to announce the addition of each of these key individuals who will be joining our winning team as campaign co-chairs.

[Donate now to join these Republicans supporting Jake LaTurner for Congress.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9903d307af&e=1050d051da)

-Team LaTurner

See the list in the press release below:

---
|
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
June 2, 2020
**LaTurner for Congress releases impressive list of campaign** **Co-Chairs: **
** List includes Dr. Helen VanEtten and ten additional notable Kansans**
**Topeka** —Kansas State Treasurer Jake LaTurner today announced the addition of a wide-range of notable Kansas Republicans who have joined his team as campaign co-chairs. The list includes known leaders in the areas of business, agriculture, and public service showing the broad strength of support for his campaign for Congress.

The list of campaign Co-Chairs includes:
---
| **Helen VanEtten, Topeka**
Republican National Committeewoman
(Serving as Chair in her personal capacity)

**Justin Hill, Lawrence**
KS Chamber of Commerce Chairman
(Serving as Chair in his personal capacity)
President, Lawrence Paper Co.

**Jim Klausmann, Topeka**
President/CEO, Midwest Health

**Rich Felts, Independence**
President, Kansas Farm Bureau

**Travis Oliver, Perry**
President, Kansas Insurance, Inc

**Ivan Crossland, Columbus**
CEO, Crossland Construction Company, Inc.

**David Murfin, Wichita**
President, Kansas Drilling Co., Inc.

**Steve Fitzgerald, Leavenworth**
Former State Senator

**Danny Zeck, Leavenworth**

**Thad Geiger, Highland**
Doniphan County Commissioner

**Mary Alice Lair, Chanute**
Former Republican National Committeewoman

---
| “These individuals are strong, influential Republican leaders in their communities, and I am humbled and grateful they have chosen to support me in my campaign for the 2nd congressional district seat,” said LaTurner. “They bring to our team, individually and collectively, additional momentum for a positive change that I know will culminate in success in the August Republican primary.”

“Jake has a rock-solid conservative record and is the only person running for Congress in the 2nd district that has what it takes to keep this seat from falling into the hands of the Democrats. We absolutely cannot afford to lose another seat in the House, and Jake is the best candidate we have to ensure a Republican win in the Kansas 2nd congressional district,” said Helen VanEtten who has been serving as Republican National Committeewoman for the past 12 years.

“Jake is the conservative champion we need in the U.S. Congress. He will fight for our values and work tirelessly on behalf of Kansas families and small business owners,” said Crossland Construction President and CEO Ivan Crossland.

“We could not be more pleased to recommend Jake LaTurner to represent our state in the 2nd district because he understands the importance of agriculture and the impact of fair taxation, low regulations, and improved infrastructure to our way of life in Kansas. We know Jake will be proactive in working with our President and members of Congress to protect our Ag interests here at home for years to come,” said Kansas Farm Bureau President Rich Felts.

“Jake has always been the kind of person that is unafraid to stand up and take the lead on things he knows are right, even when it isn’t popular. He has the integrity and know-how to make a difference, and I can’t think of a better Republican send to Washington, D.C.,” said former Kansas Republican Committeewoman Mary Alice Lair.

LaTurner announced his run for the 2nd congressional district seat in early September 2019. His campaign is centered around his Contract with Kansas, which outlines the seven promises he has made to the people of Kansas that he will carry out once elected. More detail can be found on [ContractwithKansas.com](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9aba96dee9&e=1050d051da).

This is BIG news for our campaign and we are delighted to announce the addition of each of these key individuals who will be joining our winning team as campaign co-chairs. -Team LaTurner See the list in the press release below: | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE June 2, 2020 LaTurner for Congress releases impressive list of campaign Co-Chairs: List includes Dr. Helen VanEtten and ten additional notable Kansans Topeka —Kansas State Treasurer Jake LaTurner today announced the addition of a wide-range of notable Kansas Republicans who have joined his team as campaign co-chairs. The list includes known leaders in the areas of business, agriculture, and public service showing the broad strength of support for his campaign for Congress. The list of campaign Co-Chairs includes: | Helen VanEtten, Topeka Republican National Committeewoman (Serving as Chair in her personal capacity) Justin Hill, Lawrence KS Chamber of Commerce Chairman (Serving as Chair in his personal capacity) President, Lawrence Paper Co. Jim Klausmann, Topeka President/CEO, Midwest Health Rich Felts, Independence President, Kansas Farm Bureau Travis Oliver, Perry President, Kansas Insurance, Inc Ivan Crossland, Columbus CEO, Crossland Construction Company, Inc. David Murfin, Wichita President, Kansas Drilling Co., Inc. Steve Fitzgerald, Leavenworth Former State Senator Danny Zeck, Leavenworth Thad Geiger, Highland Doniphan County Commissioner Mary Alice Lair, Chanute Former Republican National Committeewoman | “These individuals are strong, influential Republican leaders in their communities, and I am humbled and grateful they have chosen to support me in my campaign for the 2nd congressional district seat,” said LaTurner. “They bring to our team, individually and collectively, additional momentum for a positive change that I know will culminate in success in the August Republican primary.” “Jake has a rock-solid conservative record and is the only person running for Congress in the 2nd district that has what it takes to keep this seat from falling into the hands of the Democrats. We absolutely cannot afford to lose another seat in the House, and Jake is the best candidate we have to ensure a Republican win in the Kansas 2nd congressional district,” said Helen VanEtten who has been serving as Republican National Committeewoman for the past 12 years. “Jake is the conservative champion we need in the U.S. Congress. He will fight for our values and work tirelessly on behalf of Kansas families and small business owners,” said Crossland Construction President and CEO Ivan Crossland. “We could not be more pleased to recommend Jake LaTurner to represent our state in the 2nd district because he understands the importance of agriculture and the impact of fair taxation, low regulations, and improved infrastructure to our way of life in Kansas. We know Jake will be proactive in working with our President and members of Congress to protect our Ag interests here at home for years to come,” said Kansas Farm Bureau President Rich Felts. “Jake has always been the kind of person that is unafraid to stand up and take the lead on things he knows are right, even when it isn’t popular. He has the integrity and know-how to make a difference, and I can’t think of a better Republican send to Washington, D.C.,” said former Kansas Republican Committeewoman Mary Alice Lair. LaTurner announced his run for the 2nd congressional district seat in early September 2019. His campaign is centered around his Contract with Kansas, which outlines the seven promises he has made to the people of Kansas that he will carry out once elected. name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: We deserve better than "bad apples" excuses
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cFDfWjr1c936Oa_o-yyIxRpxhrg4BGlkIxfhXUKytGo=/f8P9ZTD4oqABb5Z1nFqcYsqvI9LtZnM8bw7E5X7PnLU=)

Peter,

New Yorkers are demanding change. They're standing shoulder-to-shoulder, marching for a future that I know in my heart is possible -- a future where black lives matter, where the police exist to serve our communities, not terrorize them, and where we don't have to be murdered on camera or killed by a pandemic to be seen. They're marching for a future where leaders boldly challenge institutionalized violence instead of downplaying this issue and blaming it on a few "bad apples," as Congresswoman Clarke suggested. **[That's the future I'm fighting for -- and if you've supported our movement in the past, then I hope I can count on your support now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/cFDfWjr1c936Oa_o-yyIxRpxhrg4BGlkIxfhXUKytGo=/xdgkY9SiONYZlumX5IkeqtvO0w4WUL_okSrk5hAqCMc=)**

Over these past few days, we've been focusing our energy on aiding and assisting community groups protesting here in Brooklyn, which means that our final end-of-month deadline came and went without much attention paid to the needs of our campaign. We prioritized what was important, and in doing so, we defended the very principles upon which our movement was built. But as a result, we're now falling behind on fundraising with just three weeks to go until Primary Day. **[We still have time to close the gap before our crucial filing deadline ends tomorrow, so will you chip in today and help us reach our goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/cFDfWjr1c936Oa_o-yyIxRpxhrg4BGlkIxfhXUKytGo=/xdgkY9SiONYZlumX5IkeqtvO0w4WUL_okSrk5hAqCMc=)**

What's happening right now is so much bigger than any one election, and I'll be the first to acknowledge that voting isn't going to solve all of our problems. But electing leaders who will work to dismantle the oppressive systems that have given rise to police brutality and racial inequality is an important first step.

In just a few weeks, we'll have the opportunity to take that step together. **[So join me today, and let's bring our fight for justice to Washington.](https://act.myngp.com/el/cFDfWjr1c936Oa_o-yyIxRpxhrg4BGlkIxfhXUKytGo=/xdgkY9SiONYZlumX5IkeqtvO0w4WUL_okSrk5hAqCMc=)**

Best,
Adem

* * *

******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/cFDfWjr1c936Oa_o-yyIxRpxhrg4BGlkIxfhXUKytGo=/xdgkY9SiONYZlumX5IkeqtvO0w4WUL_okSrk5hAqCMc=)******

******[VISIT OUR WEBSITE](https://act.myngp.com/el/cFDfWjr1c936Oa_o-yyIxRpxhrg4BGlkIxfhXUKytGo=/qGPsTmmA_IZTr0iKekZV_ilzR4Y9CdpwL8wa0r1A_tY=)******

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Rebuilding public trust requires accountability
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
We have to get back to the idea of public service – of serving the community – and where trust has been broken, where we've broken the community's trust in our policing, in our police leadership, we've got to find a way to restore it.

---
|

---
| Friends -- Last night, during an _**[interview on KET](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17727433/204260114/-803653937?v=1zmktwH0iW8&feature=youtu.be&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzU4YTk0MS0yYmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flEAGVjBVnZNwKQCD-SsdhwJlQ_oihgcsh0OV2OZiyI=&emci=8258a941-2ba5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=8358a941-2ba5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&ceid=15601662)**_ , I was asked a very important question: “Do you believe that there is systemic racism in law enforcement in the United States?” [_**My answer was simple: Yes.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17727434/204260115/-803653937?v=1zmktwH0iW8&feature=youtu.be&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzU4YTk0MS0yYmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flEAGVjBVnZNwKQCD-SsdhwJlQ_oihgcsh0OV2OZiyI=&emci=8258a941-2ba5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=8358a941-2ba5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&ceid=15601662) I think it is important to speak out and make sure we don’t shy away from difficult problems. That’s part of leadership: taking responsibility. Whether we’re talking about Breonna Taylor in Louisville or George Floyd in Minneapolis – unfortunately, that list of names is far too long. This has been going on for a long time. We police communities of color differently than we police communities without color. And that's a tremendous injustice. Speaking from a position of responsibility as a former police officer and Field Training Officer: We have to demand better – we have to demand better than what we've seen. We have to have some accountability. We have to put in place community policing principles. We have to get back to the idea of public service – of serving the community – and where we've broken the community's trust in our policing, in our police leadership, we've got to find a way to restore it. And the only way to restore it is with accountability. Simply put, we must do better – and I believe that we can. – Josh P.S. If you would like to see the entire interview with KET, [_**you can find it here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17727435/204260116/-937297439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzU4YTk0MS0yYmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flEAGVjBVnZNwKQCD-SsdhwJlQ_oihgcsh0OV2OZiyI=&emci=8258a941-2ba5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&emdi=8358a941-2ba5-ea11-9b05-00155d0394bb&ceid=15601662) | |
* * *
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17727436/204260117/361553606?refcode=HIC_20200601_em_org_KET_all_ftr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzU4YTk0MS0yYmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=flEAGVjBVnZNwKQCD-SsdhwJlQ_oihgcsh0OV2OZiyI=)

Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests.

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: One reason to join Beto on June 8th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

As we grieve and protest the murder of George Floyd, it becomes ever more
clear how urgent the need is to change this country. Fundamentally, from
top to bottom. And the only way to do that is to change who sits in
positions of power and public trust, from the courthouse, to the State
House, to the White House.

That is why Powered by People volunteers are working harder than they ever
have before to register as many new Democrats as possible in Texas (we
have made over 215,000 phone calls so far this week).

We know this critical voter registration work will help us win a majority
in the state legislature, a majority that can stand up against racial
gerrymandering and police brutality, a majority that can stand for equity
and equality in voting, healthcare, education, environmental justice and
economic opportunity. And if we register enough new voters, Texas will be
the state that stops Donald Trump in his tracks, awarding our 38 electoral
college votes to the Democratic nominee for the first time since 1976.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration-phone-bank_attend/34372?source=ema20200602-92320&t=1001&akid=92320%2E444211%2EyxMmTs ]That’s why we're asking you today to join Beto and the Powered by
People team for our next voter registration phone bank on Monday, June 8
at 6:30 pm Central.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-registration-phone-bank_attend/34372?source=ema20200602-92320&t=1002&akid=92320%2E444211%2EyxMmTs ]Sign up

Right now, there are hundreds of thousands of unregistered voters in Texas
who we still have to reach to remind them to register to vote. These
Texans must be heard at the ballot box.

Can you step up to make calls with us on Monday? Help us build the massive
wave of voters we need in Texas to flip the State House and stop Trump
forever.

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=92320%2E444211%2EyxMmTs

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

subject: Fwd: George Floyd, Ahmaud Arbery, Breonna Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We wanted to lift up this message from Elizabeth and let you know that since yesterday, thousands of people have already donated to support these organizations fighting for racial justice. Can you... | | |
---
We wanted to lift up this message from Elizabeth (see below) and let you know that since yesterday, thousands of people have already donated to support these organizations fighting for racial justice.

Can you join them?

**[If you're able to, please split a donation between Reclaim the Block, Movement for Black Lives, Black Visions Collective, and Violence in Boston.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc93/471805652/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1TMDJERl9PVEhfS0lDX0NfMjAyMDA2MDJfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-blm-060120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS02DF_OTH_KIC_C_20200602_V1S1_P")**

We all have a role to play to dismantle systemic racism and white supremacy, and we need to make our voices heard so America can live up our highest ideals.

-- Team Warren

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Mon, June 1, 2020
Subject: George Floyd, Ahmaud Arbery, Breonna Taylor
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com |
---
I wanted to make sure you saw the comments I made on Friday. **[But first, there are groups across the country working hard to promote racial justice and rid our country of white supremacy, and if you're able to, I'm asking you to donate to them.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc93/471805652/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1TMDJERl9PVEhfS0lDX0NfMjAyMDA2MDJfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-blm-060120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS02DF_OTH_KIC_C_20200602_V1S1_P")**

---

George Floyd should still be alive today. His family, friends, and the people of Minneapolis deserve justice. Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud Arbery should be alive -- and so many more.

The racist violence that killed George Floyd, Ahmaud Arbery, and Breonna Taylor is not new in America. We've seen sickening videos of Black Americans shot at point-blank range; killed during routine traffic stops; choked to death while gasping for air. And we know what's captured on video represents only a fraction of the violence that Black Americans experience, some of it while in police custody.

On Friday, Donald Trump referred to Black citizens in Minnesota protesting the killing of George Floyd at the hands of police as thugs and called for them to be shot, echoing the words of notorious racists of the past.

Trump is quoting old racists for a simple and ugly reason. This president is a racist, too, and any leader who refuses to swiftly and unequivocally condemn this outrageous statement shares responsibility for its consequences.

Trump threatens American lives and American democracy. We need to vote him and his enablers out. But people are hurting for reasons that go beyond Trump's statements. It's systemic racism and white supremacy that forces us to call for justice for George Floyd after he has been killed instead of providing it to him before the unthinkable happens.

As a nation and a society we have some soul searching to do. Racial disparities persist in wealth, education, employment, housing, education, and health care -- and at a time when COVID-19 is disproportionately killing Black Americans and Black businesses are going under, it can feel as if this is the way things have been and always will be.

But we are not without hope. The deep injustices we face are not inevitable. They were created and facilitated through racist, hateful, bigoted public policies. That means they can be addressed by different policies -- brave, inclusive, moral public policies.

We have to make real change in our country. And it must start in our criminal justice system. In the case of George Floyd, all of those responsible must be held accountable -- and the Department of Justice must open a real investigation into unconstitutional policing patterns and practices in the Minneapolis Police Department.

But beyond this case, we must fundamentally reform how the law is enforced in America. We need accountability for law enforcement and accountability at every stage of our criminal justice system. And any decent person who brings integrity and compassion to their work in the criminal justice system should welcome that kind of accountability. In fact, they should demand it.

And we need to do much more to rethink our approach to public safety. That means transitioning away from a punitive system of locking people up and investing in community services that lift people up.

The idea that communities of color alone are responsible for fighting against racism every single day is misguided and can have dangerous consequences. I also want to be thoughtful about the responsibility that I and others have as white Americans in this moment. We need to ask ourselves what we are doing proactively every day to dismantle systemic racism in our communities, our workplaces, and our circles of influence. It's not enough to stand as an ally. We must go further and be anti-racist.

**[If you're in a place to donate, please consider donating to these organizations working to promote racial justice. This is a small first step, but every action we take adds up, and our response to this moment will shape our future.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc93/471805652/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1TMDJERl9PVEhfS0lDX0NfMjAyMDA2MDJfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-blm-060120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS02DF_OTH_KIC_C_20200602_V1S1_P")**

Elizabeth

[**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc93/471805652/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1TMDJERl9PVEhfS0lDX0NfMjAyMDA2MDJfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-blm-060120?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS02DF_OTH_KIC_C_20200602_V1S1_P")
---

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc92/471805652/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc95/471805652/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc94/471805652/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc97/471805652/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc96/471805652/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc99/471805652/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
---|---|---|---|---|---

We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525741/45c30650/1c834da51/66e9cc98/471805652/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

Because it could be our ONLY check on this lawless president.** And if we're serious about expanding our majority, we need to be serious about flipping NY-24 -- it's one of the only districts still held by a Trump-supporting Republican that Hillary won in 2016. subject: Fox News just admitted it!!!

body:
---
| | Joe Biden emailed. Nancy Pelosi emailed.
Kamala Harris emailed.
Kirsten Gillibrand emailed.
James Carville emailed. Deb Haaland emailed. Now I'm emailing. [**_That 's how absolutely critical WINNING Ben Ray's Senate race is to OUSTING McConnell's Republican Senate. Will you rush $10 before his primary election in 5 hours to close his fundraising gap with McConnell? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b12f/18e32a7f/4cb0a75c/7b21b6bf/3594155087/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200602_em_fr_b2_begala_ia_rs&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I'll let you in on the historic numbers I'm seeing:

\- Polling shows McConnell within ONE point of losing his seat._Wow._
\- Democrats could unseat him for the first time in DECADES.

Believe me: This is our once-in-a-lifetime shot to OUST McConnell -- and FLIP his entire Senate. Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b12f/18e32a7f/4cb0a75c/7b21b6b6/3594155087/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b12f/18e32a7f/4cb0a75c/7b21b6b7/3594155087/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b12f/18e32a7f/4cb0a75c/7b21b6b4/3594155087/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b12f/18e32a7f/4cb0a75c/7b21b6b0/3594155087/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b12f/18e32a7f/4cb0a75c/7b21b6b5/3594155087/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Dear Friends,

Today **_we are a week out _**from a very big day, our **June 9 primary**.

A year of work comes down to one week of action.
_Will you stand with us over this next week?_
Our TV ad is up. Our mail is heading to mailboxes. Our door knockers and phone callers are being deployed.

**7 days to victory - with your help!**
---

---
| We need the resources to complete our message and get out the vote efforts.

One of my opponents has self-funded hundreds of thousands of dollars. Our incumbent Democrat has raised millions in special interest money.

**We don’t have nor want those things.** But we do need you to help us at this critical time...

Can we count on you to **stand up against the big money and special interests?**

| I’m proud of the race we have run - _**TOGETHER**_. I’m proud of the widespread grassroots support for our campaign.

It all comes down to the next week. We are shooting for**a Mace Majority on Tuesday, June 9th **to win this primary on the first round.

Every vote and every dollar is critical.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Chaos - the ultimate barrier to free and fair elections
body:
When righteous anger gives way to violence, justice is not being done. As long as America is in a state of turmoil, our elections are not secure. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7963712d613f/theyre-lying-to-you-4142153?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | | [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=cb0b484ece&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
#
Dear Friend -
---

**_But let justice roll down like waters, and righteousness like an ever-flowing stream._**
These words from the book of Amos are on my heart as our nation reels not only from the aftermath of the pandemic lockdown, and unspeakable, unacceptable, senseless killing of George Floyd, but also the violent, destructive riots that have demolished small businesses, shut down what little commerce had reopened, and bred fear and insecurity among America’s neighborhoods and communities.

Many of us are rightfully angry. We should be. And there is a place for anger – when it drives us to compassion, empathy, sacrifice, and justice. But anger that breeds violence, that seeks to harm others -- that kind of anger comes from evil. That is how we know these orchestrated riots across the country come not from righteous anger, but from dangerous forces that are seeking to capitalize on an act of hate to further tear us apart and destabilize our society. They will only further inflame racial tensions, rather than assuage them. And they must be stopped.

The Department of Justice is right to call these forces what they are – domestic terrorists. That is an important first step, but if we are to make a difference, to stop this hate and division, it can’t stop there. We must follow the money and out the funders. The DOJ and FBI must investigate what entities, organizations, and individuals have helped fund these coordinated riots in more than 30 U.S. cities, requiring curfews and National Guard forces to help regain peace.

Not until we target the funders of these illegal, hateful, destructive activities, will we be able stop them. Their actions represent the same agenda of the radical far-left - an agenda of chaos with the goal of centralizing a power-elite that can control people for their purposes. They are a threat to many of the values we hold dear, specifically our hard-fought effort to ensure free and fair elections for all. **As long as this chaos ensues, stoking fear, confusion, and discord, the security and integrity of our elections are in jeopardy. **

But we the people have the power to act. I hope that you will take the time to contact DOJ, write your Congressman, write your U.S. Senator and demand action to identify these sources of funding and expose the radical far-left for what it is: a movement that seeks to incite hate and discord rather than love and stability. Love, peace, and kindness are the antidotes to stopping hate, to healing wounds, and to uniting us all as Americans. No exclusions, no hyphens. United we stand. Divided we fall.

|
Sincerely,

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder
True the Vote
---
| **Please follow us on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram!**
---

---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=903bb8f8ec&e=ad8cba7e98)

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Some June (pride month) updates for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Thanks to this team we've set ourselves up for success in the runoff and beyond, but June will be a critical month for many reasons.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489000f/7f51f7bc/4e3d1d24/4ef69cc8/3141017440/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | Over the last few days, generations of pain have manifested in protests across the country. I've listened to the voices of Black Americans who have been harmed by centuries of injustice -- from slavery, to Jim Crow and segregation, to a criminal justice system that even today disproportionately harms and kills them. It has to stop. **[If you missed my email yesterday and want to hear more, please give it a read here.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489000f/7f51f7bc/4e3d1d24/4ef69ccf/3141017440/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.com/june1email/")**
---
**Peter, I just wanted to say thank you.** We set ourselves some really high internal goals this last month because we believe in this team, and we believe that the work we're doing right now will be critical to winning Texas in November.

Every time we started to fall behind, this grassroots team stepped up to the plate and got us back on track, propelling this campaign into June and toward the nomination. We have a long way to go until November, so let's keep up the momentum -- **[pitch in now to help set us up for a strong June.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489000f/7f51f7bc/4e3d1d24/4ef69cce/3141017440/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0OTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-pride?refcode=email_20200602.1nd__1493__&amount=10")**

Winning this election is such an important mission. We all have our reasons for being part of this team, but as we enter Pride month I want to talk about one that's very important to me, and make sure you know exactly where I stand:
* **I will do everything I can to lift up LGBTQ+ voices and fight for ALL Texans ' rights -- especially LGBTQ+ people of color.** So long as some of us are not equal, none of us are.
* **I strongly support legislation like the Equality Act to extend and secure critical civil rights protections for LGBTQ+ Americans.**
* **We should immediately overturn the ban on transgender people serving in our military.** When I was in combat, I didn't care what the gender identity or sexual orientation of anyone standing beside me was -- all that mattered was that they had my back and I had theirs. I fought to open frontline jobs to women, so when our government turns around and denies those same jobs to transgender Americans, I take that as an affront. It's all or none, and I'm in this fight for all of us. **[Will you join me?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489000f/7f51f7bc/4e3d1d24/4ef69cce/3141017440/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0OTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-pride?refcode=email_20200602.1nd__1493__&amount=10")**
* **We also need to enshrine protections for the LGBTQ+ community with laws banning so-called "conversion therapy."** This can do incredible harm to LGBTQ+ youth, and the fact that it's still legal in Texas is unthinkable.

**Look, it 's not just the Senate seat that's at stake this election. It's the Supreme Court, too.** And we cannot afford to wait and see what more justices like Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh would do to all the progress we've made toward equal rights for all.

The work this team has done so far is incredible, but June is the last full month before the run-off, and we can't slow down. In just over a month we'll be facing Sen. Cornyn head-on. I know this team always comes through, so let's hit the ground running and make sure we're in the best possible position in the general election.
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489000f/7f51f7bc/4e3d1d24/4ef69cce/3141017440/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0OTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-pride?refcode=email_20200602.1nd__1493__&amount=10")**
\-- MJ

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489000f/7f51f7bc/4e3d1d24/4ef69ccd/3141017440/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0OTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1493&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489000f/7f51f7bc/4e3d1d24/4ef69ccc/3141017440/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489000f/7f51f7bc/4e3d1d24/4ef69cc3/3141017440/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: We’re still counting, Brindisi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Join me at WheresBrindisi.com to hold him accountable for his silence [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=f7562d0bc3964414866e1e8d63ced334&_e=43oJL-Tp-FaL4tsBPpmUGhUs_cNWDU_Xf7PWiRY6JiM2PtAUSLvFhleYfrWtemRLRy4vSJMmz1UKbeQ5lKklT1MHyzJVOUw4WQM_oPvOjeKkoxZSl0vwUI2_ckn2Zv0uA1UwkzOel99ciDVxPDzYULwL-J7djXkZSVnXLrVnB21pHm-BLzqzcklInKJPof21yrVxzNY7pHwdaPgaJURd81ShiaRUoYmVUgGX2b6zPhrsI7hMPx36ODikz0HpTkzISDYRgI5k5ccPtQjyAde8Pl_91jAsBbKK6J553MrenGsGfGa36wwE1Rqz-YpQEC5MAzJ_Ue_jK1z_57udH8zjJUnKuxxEKaYEM5s04sMUEWbzfnJqEA7q9R9a6Sb5a92XkArJnlrWSpS2UdaJhbd3iSsF4XHR_W6l7pq-6eMJu9whhNCOA2vivCqRjPnRiJID) **Anthony Brindisi has abandoned elderly New Yorkers for over 69 days** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=f7562d0bc3964414866e1e8d63ced334&_e=43oJL-Tp-FaL4tsBPpmUGhUs_cNWDU_Xf7PWiRY6JiM2PtAUSLvFhleYfrWtemRLRy4vSJMmz1UKbeQ5lKklT1MHyzJVOUw4WQM_oPvOjeKkoxZSl0vwUI2_ckn2Zv0uA1UwkzOel99ciDVxPDzYULwL-J7djXkZSVnXLrVnB21pHm-BLzqzcklInKJPof21yrVxzNY7pHwdaPgaJURd81ShiaRUoYmVUgGX2b6zPhrXBe8L9kP6eETBAqfPLW8eRL8V0jCfg_RCsjW_g7GJNC8hJp2c4gwnd1knlQmE-vKvaYII5azbHfpbupkyrH_aTtAv-lnIAUqooYNb310uoEtUtp04SncxcKoy81SW2aSKb0GMEdu4-rekp_BGNY_fop2yvLdL1ZqEIX4cXH5UB5cgYaEiNGjj2dqlAFWq7Nu9_dvB9cYMG3_0_tZji8I2) [**ADD YOUR NAME: HOLD BRINDISI ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=f7562d0bc3964414866e1e8d63ced334&_e=43oJL-Tp-FaL4tsBPpmUGhUs_cNWDU_Xf7PWiRY6JiM2PtAUSLvFhleYfrWtemRLRy4vSJMmz1UKbeQ5lKklT1MHyzJVOUw4WQM_oPvOjeKkoxZSl0vwUI2_ckn2Zv0uA1UwkzOel99ciDVxPDzYULwL-J7djXkZSVnXLrVnB21pHm-BLzqzcklInKJPof21yrVxzNY7pHwdaPgaJURd81ShiaRUoYmVUgGX2b6zPho09XBAJ6iFJ_zXW7lqSZztHJluAofMyruKl3qUb1xCacCP_SRYb6pEszLaa2EaAtpCpaoxCcRjkVCPBNIc4NNXVJgmcyaLbtg4kvrjZJ44PQkBhSrHtRtQiIlxwbrfbRWz4AZgc7EUcKNwO7EkgXYWrTMVklNq1Fink4oNYccHL6OVN2T9TsL5lG3EmkOsfRh24sYsSYc1Fa0qIQwqLR4T) Friend, Nursing homes across New York have suffered over **6,000 deaths** since March 25th as a direct result of Gov. Cuomo’s deadly executive order for them to take in recovering COVID-19 patients.
Sadly, many of these deaths occurred within our own communities in the 22nd District. What has Anthony Brindisi had to say about Cuomo’s willing sacrifice of our elderly population?
**NOT A SINGLE WORD.** [**ADD YOUR NAME: HOLD BRINDISI ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=f7562d0bc3964414866e1e8d63ced334&_e=43oJL-Tp-FaL4tsBPpmUGhUs_cNWDU_Xf7PWiRY6JiM2PtAUSLvFhleYfrWtemRLRy4vSJMmz1UKbeQ5lKklT1MHyzJVOUw4WQM_oPvOjeKkoxZSl0vwUI2_ckn2Zv0uA1UwkzOel99ciDVxPDzYULwL-J7djXkZSVnXLrVnB21pHm-BLzqzcklInKJPof21yrVxzNY7pHwdaPgaJURd81ShiaRUoYmVUgGX2b6zPhpen77q1vuOfCle-BejN_5rN_hGlBmZKjKAvwp0gO3JtB8z9uVnkQbWxZ0QVHaX-8jIOuntjzljmyvtBfmn_HqDQ4vWsVfS5hhg7qAWhQmKAGqEpv51iURP92LrBQhUcVNhzXmapje9Obqnl6R_9L7O4RzhUxGIqj6cEXkDpJdXLA-MGgwGxq7XHJ7ay2H_O1FQUU0LmtRKgyxtX3XDGLgN) I’m not at all surprised that Brindisi – **in typical Brindisi fashion** – has remained silent on this issue as thousands of our elderly New Yorkers and their families have lost lives and loved ones.
However, I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch as our communities endure these trying times without a shred of leadership coming from Albany or Washington.
Let’s hold Brindisi accountable for his silence in light of these deaths and send a clear message that NY-22 deserves better from our elected officials. Add your name at **[WheresBrindisi.com.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=f7562d0bc3964414866e1e8d63ced334&_e=43oJL-Tp-FaL4tsBPpmUGhUs_cNWDU_Xf7PWiRY6JiO613mJq_y-_ummndmHcxWL5pd34TX-iNMmB6iUG0i9lYynXkbg6ZSl5AM_rRRdHht25BBvEZ5u_wBUZTaEDqDlqAdZ0SrXO5l0F2khwNCYsI3xjD-wBarwu1eNdsVgcakZyv4wF3BRam1bHKzyPSqs5AgEvoCHSPzMi_oxl7J_0kHaJcZsMuevNOF3e6pN5f-O-1Rmenn9CiCGSGoJZDTm9iNeITja4s28wT8nFJv1LTBtD6tz1muX7mkQ80axmeRizJQx2_XAjm5oyjnRVRkqvE2JDF2Gsp9pBrKUTfcIWcBsSgTkROIZcJQCbY5rO6agPqFw0irKuhxOUvRBCz8nr99zdLgcGDTxTQFZY8J8_Z6c5b0pselF6SjvbnN_ihDNjVdkDVQNX9j7B6QPrUvY)**

name: Tina Smith
subject: We have so much work to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend — On Sunday morning, I visited the corner of 38th and Chicago in Minneapolis, which is just a few miles from where I live. These pictures show how the community has come together to lift up the memory of George Floyd. It’s a place of reverence, and filled with both a sense of peace and of purpose. We have so much work to do, and I feel great urgency to get it done. We need justice for George Floyd and accountability for all the officers who were involved in his murder. And we need to work to fix the larger systemic problems. And, as our community continues to suffer through the COVID-19 crisis that has disproportionately affected communities of color, we need to face up to the disparities in opportunity that hurt black, brown, and indigenous people every day, and we need to use this moment to take action. We need to address the systemic problems in the Minneapolis Police Department (MPD), which sadly are not unique to Minneapolis. To start, I have asked the Department of Justice’s Civil Rights Division to immediately begin an investigation into patterns and practices of racial bias and violent policing at the MPD. I also support legislation led by my colleagues Senators Tammy Duckworth and Kamala Harris that would help states establish independent prosecutors in cases of police use of deadly force. People need to be able to trust that there is no conflict of interest when it comes to holding law enforcement accountable. **[Many of you have asked how you can help the families that have been hurt. There are many wonderful organizations lending a hand and supporting communities of color during this painful time, including Midtown Global Market and NorthPoint Health and Wellness.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17727975/204296500/1254451650?refcode=em200602-orgs&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTU2NGI3ZC0zZmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d66_ro54-HlJuTzsGH3j2dll7OzR3c5zj5iUyUVTSAo=)** | [Contribute now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17727976/204296501/1254451650?refcode=em200602-orgs&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTU2NGI3ZC0zZmE1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d66_ro54-HlJuTzsGH3j2dll7OzR3c5zj5iUyUVTSAo=)
---
Thank you so much for your generous support.
— Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States
